query: SELECT adsEnabled, JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.between_mobile') as between_mobile FROM platform_settings WHERE id = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wStqi96Bwp1QsN.a3b8e3def1a1 --database dJv8mGehu4r2vn8N2SWpLW --execute SELECT adsEnabled, JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.between_mobile') as between_mobile FROM platform_settings WHERE id = 1;
